BOARD_PALETTE_WARNING: Palette mismatch: asset %s, project %s; remap before final export

BOARD_TERRAIN_NEEDS_47: Select at least 47 static assets in canonical role order
CLEANUP_AUTO_K_TOOLTIP: K-means is smoother for larger K, but slower.
CLEANUP_CARD_GRID_SUMMARY: Auto / Manual · shared scale and offset · base size read-only
CLEANUP_CARD_PRESET_HINT: Choose a preset, then adjust the full settings below.
CLEANUP_INSPECTOR_NODE_HINT: Settings save to this cleanup node. Start or cancel from its canvas card.
COMFY_TEMPLATE_HELP: Export a workflow from ComfyUI in API format, import it here, review detected node inputs, and bind PixelForge request fields.
COMFY_TEMPLATE_SAVED: ComfyUI template saved and available to the Provider
COMFY_WORKFLOW_INVALID: Choose a valid ComfyUI API workflow JSON object
CONTENT_DETAIL_CANCELED: The previous result batch was preserved.
CONTENT_DETAIL_COMPLETE_FORMAT: %d images ready in the result batch.
CONTENT_DETAIL_INVALID_RESPONSE: The Provider returned an invalid image response.
CONTENT_DETAIL_PARTIAL_FAILURE_FORMAT: %d results completed; %d requests failed and can be retried.
CONTENT_DETAIL_UNKNOWN_ERROR: The generation failed for an unknown reason.
CONTENT_OBJECT_PASTE_PLACEHOLDER: Paste one or more new rows…
CONTENT_REFERENCE_SET_LIMIT: Current model supports up to %d references
CONTENT_SCOPE_PLANNED: Included in the selected run scope.
CONTENT_STYLE_SOURCE_HINT: Derived from the project style preset.
CONTRACT_ERROR_UNSUPPORTED_CLIPBOARD_VER: This prerelease clipboard format is no longer supported. Create a new project.
CONTRACT_ERROR_UNSUPPORTED_GRAPH_VERSION: This prerelease graph format is no longer supported. Create a new project.
CONTRACT_ERROR_UNSUPPORTED_PLUGIN_VERSIO: This prerelease Plugin API is no longer supported. Create a new project.
CONTRACT_ERROR_UNSUPPORTED_PROJECT_VERSI: This prerelease project format is no longer supported. Create a new project.
CONTRACT_ERROR_UNSUPPORTED_PROVIDER_VERS: This prerelease Provider API is no longer supported. Create a new project.
CONTRACT_ERROR_UNSUPPORTED_TEMPLATE_VERS: This prerelease workflow template format is no longer supported. Create a new project.
DIALOG_DELETE_WORKFLOW_FORMAT: Delete %s from your local workflow library? Inserted copies will remain.
DIALOG_EXPORT_OVERWRITE_BODY_FORMAT:
These files already exist:
%s

Replace them?
DIALOG_IMPORT_FAILED_BODY_FORMAT:
The following files could not be imported:
%s

Fix or replace them, then retry.
DIALOG_MATTE_NON_FLAT_BODY:
The background is not a solid color.

Try the Magic Wand tool to select the background, increase tolerance carefully, or slice directly if the image already has transparency.
DIALOG_ONBOARDING_BODY:
Quick start:
1. Drag images onto the canvas or use File > Import Images.
2. Select a sprite and use Matte, Slice, or Outline.
3. Select multiple sprites and create a Batch for whole-batch actions.
4. Use the Pixel Cleanup panel to clean one sprite or a selected group.
DIALOG_RECOVERY_BODY_FORMAT:
Autosave found:
%s

Recover it as an unsaved copy? The original project will not be overwritten.
DIALOG_UNSAVED_BODY_FORMAT:
Save changes before %s?

Save keeps your work. Discard continues without saving. Cancel stays here.
EDITOR_DISCARD_BODY: This edit document has unsaved changes. Discard them and close?
EDITOR_FRAME_LIMIT: The editor supports up to 64 frames
EDITOR_IMPORT_LAYER_FAILED: Layer import requires an asset with matching dimensions
EDITOR_INPAINT_DISABLED: No installed Provider currently declares inpaint capability
EDITOR_LAYER_LIMIT: The editor supports up to 32 layers
EDITOR_OPEN_FAILED: The selected asset could not be opened in the editor
EDITOR_OVERWRITE_BODY: Replace the source asset with the flattened visible result? Save as New is recommended when the original must remain available.
EDITOR_REMAP_RESULT: Palette color remapped across frames in %dms
EDITOR_SAVED: Edited asset saved and source context updated
EDITOR_SELECT_ASSET: Select one sprite or one batch image to edit
EMPTY_CANVAS_IMPORT_HINT: Start with an input, a reference image, or the offline example.
ERROR_CLIPBOARD_IMAGE_EMPTY: The clipboard does not contain an image.
ERROR_REFERENCE_DECODE_FAILED: The reference image cannot be read. Replace it and try again.
ERROR_REFERENCE_NOT_FOUND: The reference image is missing. Replace it and try again.
ERROR_REFERENCE_REQUIRED: Choose or import a reference image.
EXAMPLE_TEXT_PROMPT: A tiny forest shrine with mossy stones and a warm lantern
EXPORT_MISSING_FORMAT: Not created: %s. Choose another folder or retry.
GEN_CARD_PROVIDER_OUTPUT_HINT: Results keep their native size. Use pixel cleanup when you need the true-pixel target size.
GEN_ERROR_AMBIGUOUS_RESULT_NEXT: The request may have been charged. Do not resend automatically; confirm before generating again.
GEN_ERROR_AMBIGUOUS_RESULT_REASON: PixelForge cannot safely determine whether the Provider completed the request.
GEN_ERROR_AUTH_FAILED_NEXT: Open Provider settings and update the credentials before trying again.
GEN_ERROR_AUTH_FAILED_REASON: The Provider rejected the saved credentials.
GEN_ERROR_CANCEL_FAILED_NEXT: The remote request may continue and may be charged. Check the Provider before ordering again.
GEN_ERROR_CANCEL_FAILED_REASON: PixelForge could not confirm that the running request stopped.
GEN_ERROR_CLEANUP_FAILED_NEXT: Adjust cleanup settings and create a new cleanup Output.
GEN_ERROR_CLEANUP_FAILED_REASON: Local pixel cleanup could not finish for these results.
GEN_ERROR_CONTENT_POLICY_NEXT: Return to the prompt input, revise it, and generate again.
GEN_ERROR_CONTENT_POLICY_REASON: The Provider rejected the prompt under its content policy.
GEN_ERROR_INTERRUPTED_NEXT: Retry only the interrupted items from their saved input snapshots.
GEN_ERROR_INTERRUPTED_REASON: The previous run ended before these results reached a terminal state.
GEN_ERROR_INVALID_REQUEST_NEXT: Return to the generation card and correct the highlighted settings.
GEN_ERROR_INVALID_REQUEST_REASON: The Provider could not accept these generation settings.
GEN_ERROR_MALFORMED_RESPONSE_NEXT: Retry only the failed items; PixelForge will not reuse the unreadable response.
GEN_ERROR_MALFORMED_RESPONSE_REASON: The Provider response could not be read safely.
GEN_ERROR_NETWORK_NEXT: Close this message and check the network connection before deciding what to do next.
GEN_ERROR_NETWORK_REASON: The request could not reach the Provider.
GEN_ERROR_PROVIDER_INTERNAL_NEXT: Close this message and keep the redacted request id for support.
GEN_ERROR_PROVIDER_INTERNAL_REASON: The Provider could not complete the request.
GEN_ERROR_QUOTA_EXCEEDED_NEXT: Open Provider settings and check the account or billing status.
GEN_ERROR_QUOTA_EXCEEDED_REASON: The Provider reports that the account quota is unavailable.
GEN_ERROR_RATE_LIMITED_NEXT: Wait for the displayed retry time, then retry only the failed items.
GEN_ERROR_RATE_LIMITED_NEXT_WITH_SECONDS: Close this message and wait %s seconds before using the retry action on the failed item.
GEN_ERROR_RATE_LIMITED_REASON: The Provider is temporarily limiting requests.
GEN_ERROR_RESULT_COUNT_MISMATCH_NEXT: Keep completed results and retry only the missing items.
GEN_ERROR_RESULT_COUNT_MISMATCH_REASON: The Provider returned fewer results than requested.
GEN_ERROR_TIMEOUT_NEXT: The request may have been charged. Review it before confirming another generation.
GEN_ERROR_TIMEOUT_REASON: The Provider did not confirm the result before the request timed out.
GEN_PARAM_QUALITY_HELP: Choose the provider's image quality level.
GEN_PARAM_REMOVE_BG_HELP: Ask the provider to remove the generated image background.
GEN_PARAM_STRENGTH_HELP: Control how strongly the reference image affects generation.
GRAPH_NODE_GHOST_SUMMARY: Install the missing node type to run
INSPECTOR_CANDIDATE_DETAILS_UNAVAILABLE: Generation details are unavailable for this older result.
INSPECTOR_SELECT_HINT: Select a module, sprite, or batch to inspect it.
LANGUAGE_APPLY_NOTE: Language changes apply immediately. Open views refresh when they handle the language change signal.
MATTE_WARNING_NON_FLAT_BACKGROUND: Background is not uniform. Use Magic Wand or raise tolerance carefully.
ONBOARDING_INTRO: Choose a project style. Cloud keys are optional; mock and ComfyUI routes work without a cloud account.
ONBOARDING_PROVIDER: Open optional cloud Provider settings after setup
ONBOARDING_SAMPLE: Create an editable sample mock batch
OPENAI_FIELD_API_MODE_HELP: Choose Images API or a relay that exposes image generation through chat/completions. Testing chat mode sends one non-image chat request and never retries it automatically.
OPENAI_FIELD_BASE_URL_HELP: OpenAI-compatible API root or a complete chat/completions endpoint.
OPENAI_FIELD_API_KEY_HELP: Stored encrypted on this device and used only for API requests.
OPENAI_FIELD_REMOTE_MODEL_HELP: The model identifier accepted by this API or relay; it is never derived from the host name.
OPENAI_V1_FIXED_PROMPT: a wooden barrel game sprite for a 16-bit farming game
PLUGIN_SECURITY_WARNING: Plugins execute code with your user permissions. Install only plugins you trust; declared permissions are informational and are not a sandbox.
PROVIDER_PING_AUTH_FAILED: Authentication failed. Check the API key.
PROVIDER_PING_MODEL_UNCONFIRMED: Service reached, but the configured image model could not be confirmed.
PROVIDER_PING_MODEL_UNCONFIRMED_USABLE: Service reached. The configured model is not listed, but generation is enabled for this saved configuration.
PROVIDER_PING_NETWORK_ERROR: Network or TLS error. Check the address and connection.
PROVIDER_PING_PROTOCOL_ERROR: The service returned an unsupported protocol response.
PROVIDER_PING_RATE_LIMITED: The service is rate limited. Try again later.
PROVIDER_SETTINGS_CAPABILITIES_FORMAT: Capabilities — text to image: %s | image to image: %s | transparent background: %s | native pixel: %s | max batch: %d
PROVIDER_SETTINGS_SAVED: API address, model, protocol, and credential saved locally.
PROVIDER_SETTINGS_SAVE_FAILED: Credentials could not be saved. Check local file permissions.
PROVIDER_SETTINGS_SECRET_SAVED: Saved credential — enter a new value to replace
PROVIDER_STATUS_SAVED_FIRST_GENERATION: Saved; credentials will be verified on the first real generation
PROVIDER_STATUS_VALIDATION_UNAVAILABLE: This provider has no safe validation endpoint
RETRO_FIELD_API_KEY_HELP: Used only for requests to RetroDiffusion and kept in this session.
STATUS_AUTOSAVE_FAILED_FORMAT: Autosave failed in %s (%s). Save the project manually to a writable folder.
STATUS_BATCH_MARK_NEEDS_SELECTION: Select thumbnails inside a batch before marking
STATUS_BATCH_SPLIT_EMPTY: Select thumbnails inside a batch before splitting
STATUS_BATCH_SPLIT_KEEP_EMPTY: Mark at least one kept thumbnail before splitting
STATUS_CANDIDATE_BRANCH_CREATED: Continuation branch created; review settings before running.
STATUS_CANDIDATE_BRANCH_FAILED: Could not create a branch from this result.
STATUS_CANDIDATE_REFERENCE_CREATED: Result added as a new reference.
STATUS_CLEANUP_EMPTY: Select one or more sprites to clean
STATUS_EDGES_HIDDEN: Connections are hidden; new connection previews remain visible.
STATUS_EXAMPLE_OPENED: Starter opened. Edit the prompt, add optional references, then generate. Connect the new Output to Pixel Cleanup before starting cleanup.
STATUS_EXPORT_CANCELED: Export canceled; existing files were not changed
STATUS_EXPORT_EMPTY: Select one or more sprites to export
STATUS_FRAME_GROUP_CROSS_GRAPH: Modules from different graphs cannot share a stage.
STATUS_FRAME_GROUP_NEEDS_NODES: Select at least two modules to create a stage.
STATUS_FRAME_RUN_PLAN_FORMAT: Running %d targets · %d requests · up to %d results.
STATUS_FRAME_RUN_UNAVAILABLE: This stage has no generation target with valid prompt and size inputs.
STATUS_FRAME_UNGROUPED: Stage ungrouped; modules and connections were preserved.
STATUS_GRAPH_ADD_FAILED: Graph node could not be added
STATUS_GRAPH_EDIT_FAILED: Graph node parameters could not be updated
STATUS_GRAPH_EDIT_NOT_AVAILABLE: Selected graph node has no editable parameters
STATUS_GRAPH_NODES_DELETED: Graph nodes deleted: %d nodes, %d edges removed
STATUS_GRAPH_RUN_MISSING_NODE_TYPE: Cannot run graph with missing node type: %s
STATUS_GRAPH_RUN_MISSING_NODE_TYPE_FORMA: Cannot run graph with missing node type: %s
STATUS_GRAPH_RUN_NEEDS_SELECTION: Select a graph node or batch before running
STATUS_IMPORT_DONE_FORMAT: Imported %d image(s) at the current view. Use File > Focus Last Import to return.
STATUS_IMPORT_FAILED_FORMAT: Import failed: %s. Choose Retry Import after fixing the files.
STATUS_IMPORT_PARTIAL_FORMAT: Imported %d image(s); %d file(s) could not be read. Retry is available for the failed files.
STATUS_INPUT_WORKSPACE_CREATED: Input module added. Add generation settings or open the offline example to continue.
STATUS_OBJECT_ROWS_EMPTY: Select at least one structured input row.
STATUS_OPENAI_SESSION_REQUIRED: Configure an OpenAI session key before generating
STATUS_PROJECT_OPEN_FAILED_FORMAT: Open failed for %s (%s). Check that the file exists and is a valid PixelForge project.
STATUS_PROJECT_SAVE_FAILED_FORMAT: Save failed for %s (%s). Check the folder permissions or choose Save As and try again.
STATUS_PROVIDER_CREDENTIALS_REQUIRED_FOR: Configure and validate %s in Provider Settings before running this graph
STATUS_RECOVERY_COMPLETE: Autosave recovered as an unsaved copy. Use Save to choose a new project file.
STATUS_STYLE_RESOURCE_ADDED: Style added to the selected branch.
STATUS_TASK_FAILED: Processing failed. Check the input and try again.
STATUS_WORKFLOW_NEEDS_FRAME: Select one stage before saving a workflow.
STATUS_WORKFLOW_SAVED_FORMAT: %s saved to Workflows; %d external connections were excluded.
STYLE_PROMPT_INSPECTOR_HINT: Create, rename, and edit style prompts here. The selected node stores a complete preset snapshot.
STYLE_PROMPT_SELECT_HINT: Choose a built-in, plugin, or user style prompt.
STYLE_PROMPT_STATUS_DELETED: User preset deleted; this node keeps its snapshot.
STYLE_PROMPT_STATUS_SAVED: User preset and node snapshot saved.
STYLE_PROMPT_UNSAVED_BODY: Save this preset before switching? Discard switches without saving; Cancel stays here.
